nameMeanings.name: Tuitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tuite  .

variants.name: Tuite
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conan.
Irish (Leinster; of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places called Le Thuit in Eure, France, named with Old Norse thveit ‘meadow’. Compare Thwaites .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt was born in 1205, in County Westmeath, Ireland. She had at least 1 daughter with Richard Tuitt.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt est née en 1205, à County Westmeath, Irlande. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Richard Tuitt.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt wurde 1205 in County Westmeath, Irland geboren. Sie hatte mit Richard Tuitt mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt è nata il nel 1205 nel County Westmeath, Irlanda. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Richard Tuitt.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt(은)는 1205년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Richard Tuitt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt nasceu em 1205, em County Westmeath, Irlanda. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Richard Tuitt.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt родилась в 1205 г. в местности коунти вестмит, Ирландия. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Richard Tuitt.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Richard Tuitt nació en 1205, en County Westmeath, Irlanda. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Richard Tuitt.
